name: Coastal Shell Table Lamp - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Brighten your home with the coastal charm of this Coastal Shell Table Lamp from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. Crafted with a white ceramic base featuring a wave-inspired texture, this lamp features a white linen cone shade for a warm, diffused glow. The rotary knob switch offers easy on/off control, while the five-foot cord allows for versatile placement.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
